name: Pro Wireless Headphones X1
description: Premium over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation, 40-hour battery life, and Hi-Res Audio certification. Foldable design perfect for travel.

name: Smart Watch Series 9
description: Advanced smartwatch with health monitoring, GPS, AMOLED display, and 7-day battery. Water resistant to 50m.

name: 4K Action Camera Pro
description: Professional action camera with 4K/120fps recording, HorizonSteady stabilization, and waterproof up to 10m.

name: Mechanical Keyboard RGB
description: Tenkeyless mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX Red switches, per-key RGB backlighting, and aircraft-grade aluminum frame.

name: Portable SSD 2TB
description: Ultra-fast portable SSD with 2000MB/s read speeds, USB 3.2 Gen 2, drop-resistant and IP55 water resistance.

name: True Wireless Earbuds
description: Premium true wireless earbuds with hybrid ANC, transparency mode, 30-hour total playback, and IPX4 water resistance.

name: Oversized Hoodie Premium
description: Ultra-soft premium cotton oversized hoodie. Pre-shrunk, brushed interior fleece, and reinforced kangaroo pocket.

name: Running Shoes AeroFit
description: Lightweight running shoes with AeroFit cushioning system, breathable mesh upper, and carbon-fiber reinforced plate for maximum energy return.

name: Leather Crossbody Bag
description: Handcrafted genuine leather crossbody bag with RFID-blocking interior, multiple compartments, and adjustable strap.

name: Classic Denim Jacket
description: Timeless denim jacket with vintage wash finish, button closure, and chest pockets. A wardrobe essential.

name: Smart Air Purifier 360
description: 360° air purification with HEPA H13 filter, activated carbon, UV-C LED, and app control. Covers up to 500 sq ft in 12 minutes.

name: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: Full ergonomic office chair with 4D adjustable armrests, lumbar support, breathable mesh back, and adjustable headrest.

name: Scented Candle Set (6pc)
description: Luxury soy wax candle set with 6 hand-poured scents: Vanilla Noir, Sea Breeze, Cedarwood, Rose & Jasmine, Citrus Burst, and Midnight Oud.

name: Indoor Plant Collection
description: Curated set of 3 low-maintenance indoor plants (Pothos, Snake Plant, ZZ Plant) with decorative ceramic pots.

name: Yoga Mat Pro 6mm
description: Professional grade eco-TPE yoga mat with superior grip, 6mm cushioning, alignment lines, and carry strap. Free of PVC and latex.

name: Adjustable Dumbbell Set
description: Space-saving adjustable dumbbell set that replaces 15 sets of weights. Quick-adjust dial system, durable molded grip.

name: Smart Water Bottle 1L
description: Smart insulated water bottle with hydration reminder LEDs, temperature display, BPA-free Tritan construction. Keeps drinks cold 24hr / hot 12hr.

name: Resistance Bands Kit
description: Complete resistance band kit with 5 fabric bands (10-50 lbs), ankle straps, handles, and door anchor. Perfect for home gym workouts.

name: Vitamin C Serum 30ml
description: Clinical-strength 20% Vitamin C serum with Hyaluronic Acid and Niacinamide. Brightens, firms, and protects. Dermatologist tested.

name: Hydrating Face Cream
description: Lightweight daily moisturizer with broad-spectrum SPF 30, ceramides, and peptides. Hydrates for 72 hours without clogging pores.

name: Jade Gua Sha Set
description: Authentic jade gua sha facial tool set. Reduces puffiness, improves circulation, and defines facial contours. Includes storage pouch.

name: Atomic Habits (Hardcover)
description: The #1 New York Times bestseller. Tiny Changes, Remarkable Results. Over 10 million copies sold worldwide. Hardcover edition.

name: Clean Code (Paperback)
description: A Handbook of Agile Software Craftsmanship by Robert C. Martin. Essential reading for every software developer.

name: The Psychology of Money
description: Timeless lessons on wealth, greed, and happiness by Morgan Housel. Explores how people think about money in surprising ways.
